hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -q '^grep' || exit 0; term=$(echo "$cmd" | sed -n 's/.*grep[^"]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); [ -z "$term" ] && term=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i !~ /^-/ && $i != "grep") {print $i; break}}'); [ -z "$term" ] && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(ERROR|error|WARN|warn|DEBUG|debug)' && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -q '\-r' || exit 0; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Smart-search: smart-search \\\"$term\\\" saves 71% tokens (820t/lookup). Use for CamelCase symbols.\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\"}}"

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; base=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}'); echo "$base" | grep -q '^rtk' && exit 0; case "$base" in grep) msg='grep → rtk grep (614K tokens/yr)' ;; git) msg='git → rtk git (175K tokens/yr)' ;; find) msg='find → rtk find (308K tokens/yr)' ;; tail) msg='tail → rtk tail (120K tokens/yr)' ;; ls) msg='ls → rtk ls (60K tokens/yr)' ;; cat) msg='cat → rtk read (71% savings)' ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"RTK: $msg (60-90% token savings)\"}}"

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "\.claude/projects.*memory/"; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Memory file written. Sync .agents/MEMORY.md with any new or changed content before completing."}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
